subject: January catch up window
snippet: Dawn proposing Tuesday January 12 for our next planning session
body:
Dawn,

Proposing January 12 2027 at 10 AM for our next planning session at the office. Please bring the household reconciliation for 2026 and whatever direction Nathan has landed on for the 529 for Lily. Column royalties and coaching income will need a straight ledger from you.

Linda

subject: October column payment issued
snippet: Candidates piece went to print. Payment issued today
body:
Dawn,

Candidates analysis piece went to print. Payment issued today at the usual rate.

For the November column I would like to run the endgame retrospective we discussed. Word count 1800 to 2200. Deadline November 16.

Carol

subject: Thanksgiving week travel locked
snippet: Mom flights confirmed. JFK to SFO Nov 21 arriving 2:15 PM
body:
Mom,

Flights confirmed. Delta 1428 JFK to SFO November 21 arriving 2:15 PM. Return Delta 1233 November 28 SFO to JFK departing 8:40 AM.

Lily is asking every day about the guest room chess set. Please tell her it is still there.

Ethan

subject: Portland update
snippet: Dawn moved into a proper house. Address for future mail below
body:
Dawn,

Moved into a proper house end of last winter. Address for future mail is 3821 SE Rex Street Portland OR 97202. The old P.O. Box is dead.

The Botvinnik and Smyslov match book you sent for my birthday made my week. Reading Bronstein at the moment. Curious what you think of the sixty four move draw from the Zurich book.

Daniel

subject: Elena schedule for October 24
snippet: Dawn Elena has the intercollegiate viewing at Bayside that morning
body:
Dawn,

Elena has the intercollegiate viewing at Bayside on October 24 in the morning. Can we shift her Saturday block to Sunday October 25 at 10 AM.

Irina Volkov

subject: October 24 intercollegiate BIT match
snippet: Coach venue confirmed for 1 PM Morrison Hall Rm 206
body:
Coach,

Venue confirmed for 1 PM Morrison Hall Rm 206 on October 24. BIT sending nine boards. We have twelve. Board pairings to follow this weekend.

Marcus

subject: Festival CS sponsorship for November 14
snippet: Dawn CS department in for the same amount as last year
body:
Dawn,

CS department in for the same amount as last year for the November 14 Festival. Please route the invoice through the Foundation. Morrison Hall Rm 206 is locked for the demo lounge from noon on the day.

Sam

UPS Notification

subject: Homeowner policy PMC-HO-2019-BER-88214 renewal for 2027
snippet: Renewal quote enclosed. Chess collection rider due for review
body:
Ms Lawson,

Annual renewal quote enclosed for your homeowner policy PMC-HO-2019-BER-88214. Total annual premium 2847 dollars up 3.4 percent from last year.

The chess collection blanket rider HRE-CHESS-2019-A144 has not been updated since 2019. If the declared value needs revision please have a formal appraisal report sent to your agent before December 15 2026.

Palisades Mutual Casualty

subject: Tilden Park trail advisory
snippet: Wildcat Canyon partial closure through November 22
body:
East Bay Regional Park District trail advisory.

Wildcat Canyon and Nimitz Way partial closure through November 22 for storm damage repair. Alternate routes suggested via Inspiration Point.

Unsubscribe at profile settings.

subject: Featured teaching opportunity
snippet: Growing chess platform hiring experienced coaches
body: Growing chess platform hiring experienced coaches. Base pay 30 dollars per hour. Please reply with resume.\n\nSent via automated distribution.

subject: Partner with us for adult classes
snippet: We match your rate and refer local Berkeley students
body:
Ms Lawson,

We match your rate and refer local Berkeley students to independent coaches. Interested. Please respond.

Chess Class Masters

subject: Re Salon Evening December 19
snippet: Dawn in for the wine and the Godel argument you promised
body:
Dawn,

In for the wine and the Godel argument you promised last time. Bringing the Kant volume I mentioned in September.

James

subject: Re Salon Evening December 19
snippet: Dawn I am in. Reminder on the tree nut allergy
body:
Dawn,

I am in for December 19. Reminder on the tree nut allergy. Any cheese board is fine as long as it is clean of walnuts and hazelnuts.

Thomas

subject: Fresh yeast for Thanksgiving
snippet: The bakehouse is out of fresh yeast. Suggest we source it before the 22nd
body:
The bakehouse is out of fresh yeast. Suggest we source it before the 22nd or the rolls will not rise properly.

Also a note that Berkeley Bowl has the roasting pan I have wanted for two years on sale.

Nathan

subject: Annual physical January 15 2027 confirmation
snippet: Dawn Lawson January 15 2027 at 8:30 AM with Dr Yamamoto
body:
Ms Lawson,

Your annual physical is confirmed for January 15 2027 at 8:30 AM with Dr Robert Yamamoto. Please arrive fifteen minutes early. Fasting labs required.

Berkeley Internal Medicine

subject: Fwd Reader question on Nimzo Indian article
snippet: Forwarding a reader question you may want to address in the November piece
body:
Dawn,

Forwarding a reader question you may want to address in the November piece. He is asking about the exchange variation Fischer used against Spassky game 6 and how it maps to Ding recent play.

Carol
